subject: WM-0179 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Exact priority/signed-Int32-index/Uint32-sequence parity, nine fixed stable passes, constructor-owned scratch and reuse/capacity semantics verified; only three authorized product/test files changed. Admission and benchmark SHA/canonical evidence validate at b762b70: one measured 2x6s 40/8 PASS with reported empty stderr, one 9/2 entity-store result at 1.5104 ms and exact 8192/checksum invariants. PS5.1 30-case self-test, typecheck, 11 focused tests, M1-M3 hashes, boundaries, handoff, taskctl, diff and full quality pass; no live admission or benchmark rerun.
